examples: I never saw such a glaring example of misrepresentation.
I wish to point out your misrepresentation of the facts.
So which was it, misperception, misrepresentation, or misallocation?
They are beginning to get fed up with all the blame and criticism and misrepresentation.
Gauhar Abdygaliyeva, a native of Kazakhstan, is furious at the misrepresentation of her country.
